prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the DAZA 2.5L TFSI (EA855 Evo) with upgraded turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine, 1.06 A/R housing) paired with APR’s high-flow downpipe (3.5" catted) and CTS Turbo 4" stainless steel cat-back exhaust with resonated center section and dual 3.5" tips. Requires APR’s upgraded intercooler (core dimensions: 24.5" x 12.5" x 3.5") and 750cc Bosch Motorsport injectors (PN: 0 280 158 117) for 550-600whp on 93 octane (100 octane pushes 650whp).

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Audi-specific valving, 80mm stroke front, 100mm rear) with custom spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) and adjustable top mounts (0-3° camber adjustment). Paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (hollow-core, 3-way adjustable) and Audi Sport ceramic brake pads (PN: 8S0 698 151 A) with Pagid RSL29 rotors (370mm x 34mm, slotted).

034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mounts (70A durometer, billet aluminum) and Transmission Mount Insert (polyurethane, 95A durometer) to eliminate DAZA 2.5L TFSI’s torque steer under WOT. Full drivetrain reinforcement with 034 Motorsport Differential Mount Insert (aluminum, replaces OEM rubber) and Neuspeed Power Pulleys (crank, water pump, and alternator) to reduce parasitic loss by 8-10hp.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (RS3-specific, 30mm front fender flares, 40mm rear) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (2x2 twill, 1.5mm thickness) and integrated LED turn signals (Lux H8 V4, 6000K). Front bumper lip replaced with a custom 3D-printed ABS unit (aggressive 45mm splitter extension) and rear diffuser from Maxton Design (carbon fiber, 3-fin design, compatible with OEM exhaust cutouts).

Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5" ET35 (front) and 19x11" ET40 (rear) wheels with 265/30/19 and 295/25/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (custom stretched fitment, 5mm spacer front, 10mm spacer rear). Wheel hardware upgraded to ARP 12-point lug bolts (M14x1.5, 25mm length) and OEM+ wheel studs (Audi PN: 8K0 601 177 A).

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul: Status Gruppe RS3-specific carbon fiber steering wheel (flat-bottom, Alcantara grip, 350mm diameter) with integrated Momo quick-release hub. Seats replaced with Recaro Pole Position II (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leatherette, 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses). Custom roll cage by VAC Motorsports (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, bolt-in design with harness bar) and full interior wrap in 3M Matte Graphite (PN: 1080-GPH).
